posts.author: Quicko
posts.text: Quick ITR filing issue — Hello @Amey1 We have enabled ITR filing for AY 2026-27. However, ITD have not yet enabled Autofill and JSON schema’s for last financial year. Thus, you can manually prepare your ITR and keep it ready. Once the ITD releases the schema, we shall make the changes and you will be able to submit your ITR. Hope, this clears your doubt! Thank you

posts.author: Amey1
posts.text: Quick ITR filing issue — @Quicko is ITR filing ready to file. I checked but when clicked on file ur return or start here from ITR it is not working. The form is not opening
